segments.text: Lesson 6.

translation.text: 第6课。

segments.text: Smash-and-Grab.

translation.text: 砸橱窗抢劫。

segments.text: Listen to the tape, then answer the question below.

translation.text: 听录音，然后回答下面的问题。

segments.text: How did Mr.

translation.text: 泰勒先生是怎样

segments.text: try to stop the thieves?

translation.text: 试图阻止盗贼的？

segments.text: The expensive shops in a famous arcade near Piccadilly were just opening.

translation.text: 皮卡迪利大街附近一条著名拱廊里的高档商店刚刚开门。

segments.text: At this time of the morning, the arcade was almost empty.

translation.text: 早晨这个时候，拱廊里几乎空无一人。

segments.text: Mr.

translation.text: 泰勒先生，

segments.text: the owner of a jewelry shop, was admiring a new window display.

translation.text: 一家珠宝店的老板，正在欣赏新布置的橱窗。

segments.text: Two of his assistants had been working busily since eight o'clock and had only just finished.

translation.text: 他的两名店员从八点起一直忙个不停，刚刚才布置完。

segments.text: necklaces and rings had been beautifully arranged on a background of black velvet.

translation.text: 项链和戒指精美地陈列在黑色天鹅绒衬底上。

segments.text: After gazing at the display for several minutes, Mr.

translation.text: 泰勒先生凝视了几分钟后，

segments.text: went back into his shop.

translation.text: 回到了店里。

segments.text: The silence was suddenly broken when a large car, with its headlights on and its horn blaring, roared down the arcade.

translation.text: 突然，一辆开着前灯、狂按喇叭的大轿车呼啸着冲进拱廊，打破了寂静。

segments.text: It came to a stop outside the jewelers.

translation.text: 车在珠宝店外停了下来。

segments.text: One man stayed at the wheel, while two others with black stockings over their faces jumped out and smashed the window of the shop with iron bars.

translation.text: 一人留在驾驶座上，另外两人用黑色长筒袜蒙着脸跳下车，用铁棍砸碎了商店的橱窗。

segments.text: While this was going on, Mr.

translation.text: 这一切发生时，泰勒先生

segments.text: was upstairs.

translation.text: 正在楼上。

segments.text: He and his staff began throwing furniture out of the window.

translation.text: 他和店员们开始把家具从窗户扔下去。

segments.text: Chairs and tables went flying into the arcade.

translation.text: 椅子和桌子纷纷飞进拱廊。

segments.text: One of the thieves was struck by a heavy statue, but he was too busy helping himself to diamonds to notice any pain.

translation.text: 一名窃贼被一尊沉重的雕像击中，但他正忙着大把抓钻石，根本顾不上疼。

segments.text: The raid was all over in three minutes, for the men scrambled back into the car and it moved off at a fantastic speed.

translation.text: 抢劫行动三分钟便结束了；几个人爬回汽车，车以惊人的速度开走。

segments.text: Just as it was leaving, Mr.

translation.text: 车正要离开时，泰勒先生

segments.text: rushed out and ran after it, throwing ashtrays and vases, but it was impossible to stop the thieves.

translation.text: 冲出来追赶，一边投掷烟灰缸和花瓶，但根本无法拦住盗贼。

segments.text: They had got away with thousands of pounds worth of diamonds.

translation.text: 他们抢走了价值数千英镑的钻石。
